headline: Is Copart, Inc. (CPRT) A Good Stock to Buy?
summary: Is CPRT a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Copart, Inc. on Summit Stocks’s Substack by Lucas | Summit Stocks. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CPRT. Copart, Inc.’s share was trading at $33.97 as of March 12th. CPRT’s trailing and forward P/E were 22.36 and 22.88 respectively […]
